articles.title: Fresh Iranian attacks on US targets in the region
articles.summary: Fresh Iranian attacks on US targets in the region The Iranian army said that it carried out a new wave of drone attacks targeting US military facilities at al-Azraq US base in Jordan and Sheikh Isa US base in Bahrain. According to state broadcaster IRIB, the operation was launched early on Wednesday. In Jordan, Iranian forces reportedly struck "housing and welfare facilities" and "equipment storage sites used by the US military". Meanwhile, large equipment warehouses and heavy aircraft maintenance and repair workshops were targeted at the Sheikh Isa US base in Bahrain.

articles.title: Trump approves nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia: Report
articles.summary: Trump approves nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia: Report US President Donald Trump has officially approved a landmark agreement with Saudi Arabia that will provide the Gulf country with a civilian nuclear program, The Wall Street Journal reported citing US officials. articles.title: Centcom announces completing 11th night of strikes against Iran
articles.summary: Centcom announces completing 11th night of strikes against Iran The US Central Command (Centcom) said it "successfully completed" attacks for the 11th night in a row targeting various sites across Iran. Centcom said its latest wave of strikes targeted "Iranian military operations centers, maritime capabilities, aircraft hangars, drone storage facilities, and military logistics infrastructure".

articles.title: More US attacks reported in Iran
articles.summary: More US attacks reported in Iran The General Directorate of Crisis Management of Iran's East Azerbaijan province said that a military area near the city of Tabriz was struck by the US, but added that no point inside the city was attacked, state media reported.  Meanwhile, two explosions were also heard in Bushehr, with its governor Mohammad Mozaffari indicating that the "source of the explosion is under investigation". Further US attacks were reported in the southern cities of Chabahar and Konarak.

articles.summary: Explosions reported in northwestern Iran's Tabriz, capital Tehran and across southern Iran.

articles.title: Centcom launches attacks against Iran, several blasts reported in Tabriz, Sirik
articles.summary: Centcom launches attacks against Iran, several blasts reported in Tabriz, Sirik The US Central Comand (Centcom) announced launching new strikes targeting Iran for the 11th consecutive night, as local media reports explosions across the country.  Blasts were heard in the southern city of Sirik and north western Tabriz.  Meanwhile, the Nour News agency reported that air defence was activated in Tehran to confront "hostile" targets.
